vi.name: React.gg Modern React Roadmap
vi.summary: Lộ trình này bám theo 10 section công khai trên react.gg: từ Big Picture, mô tả UI, state, effects, tối ưu, custom hooks cho đến concurrent rendering, React on the Server và interview prep.

milestones.title: The Big Picture
milestones.description: Bắt đầu với Why?, Thinking in React, Imperative vs. Declarative và Pure Functions để hiểu tại sao React hoạt động theo mô hình hiện đại này.

milestones.title: Describing UI
milestones.description: Đi qua Components, JSX, Elements vs. Components và Props để mô tả UI bằng component tree rõ ràng và có thể tái sử dụng.

milestones.title: Bringing React to Life
milestones.description: Học Handling Events, Preserving Values with useState, Using useState và When React Renders để làm UI có tương tác thực sự.

milestones.title: Escaping React
milestones.description: Section này đi vào Reality Check, Managing Effects, Preserving Values with useRef và Teleportation vs. Context cho các tình huống vượt khỏi flow thuần render.

milestones.title: Optimizing React
milestones.description: Tập trung vào Complex State with useReducer, Referential Equality, useMemo/useCallback, useLayoutEffect/useSyncExternalStore và useEffectEvent để tối ưu app production.

milestones.title: Custom Hooks
milestones.description: Học cách trừu tượng hóa reactive logic thành custom hooks rõ ràng, tái sử dụng được và gần với tình huống production hơn.

milestones.title: Rebuilding useHooks
milestones.description: Củng cố kiến thức bằng cách rebuild các hook thực tế như useScript, useEventListener, useFetch, useMouse, useIdle và nhiều hooks khác từ hệ useHooks.

milestones.title: Concurrent Rendering
milestones.description: Bao phủ useDeferredValue, startTransition, useTransition, Actions, useOptimistic và Composing Boundaries để hiểu concurrent React hiện đại.

milestones.title: React on the Server
milestones.description: Đi qua Why Server Components?, Composing the Network và Server Actions để nắm phần React v19 chạy phía server.

milestones.title: React Interview Questions
milestones.description: Kết thúc lộ trình bằng interview prep với 50+ câu hỏi và 90+ challenges, đúng tinh thần react.gg dùng practice để khóa kiến thức.

outcomes: Có một lộ trình React rõ ràng đúng theo 10 section công khai của react.gg.
Đi từ foundation đến React v19 features như Actions, Concurrent Rendering và Server Components.
Có đủ practice items để vừa học lý thuyết vừa kiểm tra lại qua challenges và interview prep.
Xây nền tảng tốt hơn để ship React app production-ready thay vì chỉ làm tutorial đơn lẻ.

support.title: Phù hợp cho ai?
support.description: Phù hợp với người đã biết JavaScript cơ bản và muốn học React hiện đại theo đúng progression mà react.gg đang public trên landing page của họ.
items: Người muốn có roadmap React mạch lạc thay vì nhảy giữa nhiều tutorial rời rạc
Frontend developer muốn cập nhật React v19 như Actions, Server Components, Transitions
Người cần practice-heavy roadmap với interview questions và challenges đi kèm

en.name: React.gg Modern React Roadmap
en.summary: This roadmap follows the 10 public sections highlighted on react.gg, moving from the big-picture mental model into UI description, state, effects, optimization, custom hooks, concurrent rendering, React on the Server, and interview prep.

milestones.title: The Big Picture
milestones.description: Start with Why?, Thinking in React, Imperative vs. Declarative, and Pure Functions to build the right mental model for modern React.

milestones.title: Describing UI
milestones.description: Work through Components, JSX, Elements vs. Components, and Props so you can describe UI with reusable component structure.

milestones.title: Bringing React to Life
milestones.description: Cover Handling Events, Preserving Values with useState, Using useState, and When React Renders to make your UI interactive.

milestones.title: Escaping React
milestones.description: Move into Reality Check, Managing Effects, Preserving Values with useRef, and Teleportation vs. Context for the cases where pure rendering is not enough.

milestones.title: Optimizing React
milestones.description: Study Complex State with useReducer, Referential Equality, useMemo/useCallback, useLayoutEffect/useSyncExternalStore, and useEffectEvent to reason about production performance.

milestones.title: Custom Hooks
milestones.description: Learn how to extract reactive logic into custom hooks that are easier to reuse and reason about across a larger app.

milestones.title: Rebuilding useHooks
milestones.description: Reinforce the material by rebuilding practical hooks like useScript, useEventListener, useFetch, useMouse, useIdle, and more from the useHooks ecosystem.

milestones.title: Concurrent Rendering
milestones.description: Cover useDeferredValue, startTransition, useTransition, Actions, useOptimistic, and Composing Boundaries to understand the modern concurrent model.

milestones.title: React on the Server
milestones.description: Walk through Why Server Components?, Composing the Network, and Server Actions to understand server-side React in the React v19 era.

milestones.title: React Interview Questions
milestones.description: Close the journey with interview prep built around 50+ questions and 90+ challenges, matching the public positioning on react.gg.

outcomes: Follow a React roadmap aligned to the 10 public react.gg course sections.
Move from foundations into React v19 topics like Actions, Concurrent Rendering, and Server Components.
Pair concept learning with practice-heavy material including challenges and interview prep.
Build a stronger path toward shipping modern, production-ready React apps.

support.title: Who is this for?
support.description: A strong fit for developers who already know basic JavaScript and want a modern React progression based on the public structure described on react.gg.
items: Learners who want a coherent React roadmap instead of disconnected tutorials
Frontend developers catching up on React v19 features like Actions, Server Components, and Transitions
Developers who prefer challenge-heavy learning with interview prep built in

ja.name: React.gg Modern React Roadmap
ja.role: フロントエンド開発者
ja.summary: このロードマップは react.gg の公開ページにある 10 個の section をベースに、Big Picture から UI 記述、state、effects、最適化、custom hooks、concurrent rendering、React on the Server、interview prep まで順番にたどります。

milestones.title: The Big Picture
milestones.description: Why?, Thinking in React, Imperative vs. Declarative, Pure Functions から始めて、modern React の土台となる考え方を整理します。

milestones.title: Describing UI
milestones.description: Components, JSX, Elements vs. Components, Props を通して、UI を component tree として表現する感覚を固めます。

milestones.title: Bringing React to Life
milestones.description: Handling Events, Preserving Values with useState, Using useState, When React Renders によって UI をインタラクティブにします。

milestones.title: Escaping React
milestones.description: Reality Check, Managing Effects, Preserving Values with useRef, Teleportation vs. Context を学び、純粋な render だけでは足りない場面に対応します。

milestones.title: Optimizing React
milestones.description: useReducer、Referential Equality、useMemo/useCallback、useLayoutEffect/useSyncExternalStore、useEffectEvent を通して production 性能を考えます。

milestones.title: Custom Hooks
milestones.description: reactive logic を custom hooks として切り出し、再利用性と見通しを高める考え方を身につけます。

milestones.title: Rebuilding useHooks
milestones.description: useScript、useEventListener、useFetch、useMouse、useIdle などの practical hooks を作り直しながら理解を深めます。

milestones.title: Concurrent Rendering
milestones.description: useDeferredValue、startTransition、useTransition、Actions、useOptimistic、Composing Boundaries を通して concurrent React を学びます。

milestones.title: React on the Server
milestones.description: Why Server Components?, Composing the Network, Server Actions を通じて、React v19 時代の server-side React を整理します。

milestones.title: React Interview Questions
milestones.description: 最後は 50+ questions と 90+ challenges を軸にした interview prep で知識を固定します。

outcomes: react.gg の公開 10 section に沿った React ロードマップをたどれます。
基礎から Actions、Concurrent Rendering、Server Components まで段階的に進めます。
challenge と interview prep を組み合わせた practice-heavy な学習フローになります。
modern で production-ready な React app を作るための土台を強化できます。

support.title: こんな人におすすめ
support.description: 基本的な JavaScript は理解していて、react.gg の公開構成をベースに modern React を系統立てて学びたい人に向いています。
items: 断片的な tutorial ではなく一貫した React roadmap が欲しい学習者
Actions、Server Components、Transitions など React v19 に追いつきたい frontend developer
challenge と interview prep を重視した学び方をしたい人
